info.title: BambooHR API
info.description: BambooHR REST API for managing employees, applicant tracking, benefits, time off, time tracking, company files, goals, training, reports, and webhooks.

get.description: Returns list of available employee fields
Returns list of available list fields

put.description: Updates values for a list field

get.description: Returns list of tabular field definitions
Returns details of a specific application

post.description: Adds a comment to an application
Updates the status of an applicant

get.description: Returns list of company locations for ATS
Returns list of company benefit plans
Returns list of benefit coverage types
Returns benefit events for an employee
Returns member benefits for an employee

post.description: Creates a new company file category
Updates metadata on a company file

get.description: Returns list of company files and categories
Returns employee data for the specified employee ID

post.description: Creates a new employee file category

put.description: Updates sharing settings for a goal

post.description: Creates a comment on a goal
Creates a time tracking hour record
Creates or updates multiple time tracking records

get.description: Returns IDs of employees that have changed since a given date

post.description: Uploads a photo for an employee

get.description: Returns table data for an employee

post.description: Creates a new row in an employee table
Updates a row in an employee table

get.description: Returns list of time off policies
Returns time off policies for an employee

put.description: Assigns time off policies to an employee

get.description: Returns time off balance for an employee
Returns list of time off requests

put.description: Updates the status of a time off request

get.description: Returns timesheet entries for an employee

post.summary: Create or update timesheet clock entries
Create or update timesheet hour entries

get.description: Returns training records for an employee

basicAuth.description: BambooHR API key as username with any password (x for convention)
